title: gh-150178: Fix refcount leaks in hamt allocation failure paths
author: lpyu001

comments.author: aisk
comments.body: The fix looks good to me. However, I think the NEWS entry is too internal-facing, and it's a rare-case fix, so I don't think we need a NEWS entry for it.
